Interface ISFSObject

All Superinterfaces:
Iterable<Map.Entry<String, SFSDataWrapper>>
All Known Implementing Classes:
SFSObject, SFSObjectLite
public interface ISFSObject extends Iterable<Map.Entry<String, SFSDataWrapper>>
